title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
